_comment: IRON STATIC song registry. Manage with: python scripts/manage_songs.py
_active_rule: Exactly one song should have status='active' at any time. Scripts and Copilot read the active song for context.

songs.title: Ventura
songs.archived_reason: Used as a test fixture for parse-als and extract-midi-clips skill development. Not an original IRON STATIC composition.
songs.notes: Ventura.als was brought in as an example Ableton project to develop and validate tooling. Outputs under outputs/Ventura_* and outputs/midi_clips/ventura/ are parse artifacts, not canonical IRON STATIC material.
